---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for the PEC App platform enhancement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement, discussion
assignees: ''

---

## 1. Feature Relationship

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please provide a high-fidelity description. (e.g. I'm always frustrated when [...] in the academic management module)

---

## 2. Suggested Solution

A clear and concise description of the new functional capability you want to add to the PEC App platform.

---

## 3. Institutional Alternatives

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered to achieve the same result.

---

## 4. Operational ROI and Performance Impact

How does this feature contribute to the institutional goals of digital transformation, paper reduction, and sub-second performance?

---

## 5. Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here. (e.g. 3D maps, mobile-responsive mockups)

---
